title: How a Godly Man Chases God, Not a Wife
caption:
The guy scanning every room for her is easy to spot, and she can spot him too. The guy walking with God becomes the man worth marrying. The order is the whole thing.

Let prayer come before the search. Build a life you don't need rescuing from. Stop performing readiness for someone who isn't there yet. Trust the timeline you can't see.

"Delight yourself in the Lord, and he will give you the desires of your heart." — Psalm 37:4

Not because you earned her by wanting her hard enough. Because a man chasing God becomes the man worth following.

Save this for the next time waiting feels like wasting time.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #psalm #scripture #relationships #singleness
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
